entities.name: Credentialing Mirage
entities.context: V's term for the flawed over-reliance on credentials in hiring; critiqued in his Don Hirexote article

entities.name: Longitudinal Correlated Data
entities.context: V's proposed alternative to credentials - tracking consistent behavioral patterns over time

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company building systems for mental model mapping and longitudinal verification

entities.name: Mental Model Mapping
entities.context: Approach of tracking how a person thinks, solves problems, and relates to others over their career span

entities.name: Correlated Data Points
entities.context: Verification method comparing self-reflection against peer feedback and actual timelines

entities.name: Talent Agent of the Future
entities.context: V's vision of future talent representation as infrastructure of verification, not just human intermediaries

entities.name: Don Hirexote
entities.context: V's article critiquing credentialing in hiring (title is a pun on Don Quixote)

relationships.context: Careerspan is building the system that implements longitudinal correlated data
The system maps a person's mental model over their career span
Longitudinal data is positioned as the solution to the credentialing problem
Correlated data points are the practical mechanism for longitudinal verification
Future talent agents will be infrastructure built on verification through correlated data
The article where V introduced and critiqued the Credentialing Mirage concept
